headline: How Universal Health Services’ (UHS) GW Agreement Strengthens Its Physician-Led Care Delivery Model
summary: Universal Health Services, Inc. (NYSE:UHS) is one of the best medical care facilities stocks to buy according to analysts. Analysts see roughly 35.1% average upside, supported by one of the broader facility footprints in the group.
